---
title: "Knowledge Vault and a Bad Sense of Direction"
description: "Bumping into Knowledge Vault co-author Ni Lao — and finding out we share a navigational weakness."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-05-16"
categories: [knowledge graphs, conference, personal]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Knowledge Vault co-author Ni Lao at WWW 2019.](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Nice to know that one of the authors of the 2014 Knowledge Vault paper, Ni Lao, shares the same bad sense of direction as I do. :-)


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_knowledgegraph-activity-6534673959772917760-l9GW).*
